title: Metals Ultra
description: Handcrafted PBR textures for Minecraft & mod metals!
body:
[![](https://i.imgur.com/jocYHF0.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stained-glass-ultra)   ![](https://i.imgur.com/PZduvU9.png)   [![](https://i.imgur.com/qPdqhzs.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-ultra-pbr)

This pack features handcrafted PBR & POM textures for Minecrafts metals as well as continuously growing support for all your shiny mod metals!

Currently supported mods:

- Oxidized (all blocks and Copper Golem)

- Charm (cut iron, weathered and oxidized iron and gold blocks)

- Immersive Weathering (cut iron, plate iron, iron doors, trapdoors and iron bars)

- Decorative Blocks (bar panel, brazier, big chain)

- Golden Hopper 

- Trash Cans 

Metals Ultra is build for Complementary Reimagined, but every shader that supports the labPBR format should work.

Should be compatible with every Minecraft version starting 1.8, the "incompatible" warning is safe to ignore. Make sure to position this pack ABOVE every other resource pack that alters blocks included in this pack! Please note that this pack only adds textures for shader support, if you don't play with shaders it won't do a thing!
